sections: Hero: Full viewport, cinematic moody deep sea image overlay with noise, max background opacity 40%, large center typography in Cormorant Garamond.
Beat 1: Scroll-triggered parallax text reveal, introducing the narrative. Wide asymmetric padding.
Beat 2: Brass metallic accents highlighting key metrics or philosophy. Use grid bento box strategy.
Beat 3: Deep ocean layered visual, depth-shift morph transition area.
Footer: Minimalistic bottom anchor with massive typographic logo.
home.visual_effects: Film-grain overlay (fixed pointer-events-none z-50), smooth scroll (Lenis required), parallax images via Framer Motion.

log.sidebar: Fixed width w-64 or w-72, abyss_black bg. Collapsible PARA category accordion. Minimal styling, strict alignment.
log.main_pane: Scrollable flex/grid container, midnight_navy bg, top search bar, tag filter chips.
log.cards: Cardless or subtle 1px border (#D4AF37/20), sharp edges. Hover state: signal cyan glow or 2px left-border highlight, slight background lighten.
log.empty_state: Monospace 'Directory empty' message with blinking cursor or ASCII art.

buttons.primary: bg-brass text-abyss_black font-bold uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-antique_gold transition-all duration-300 rounded-none px-6 py-3
buttons.ghost: border border-brass/50 text-brass hover:bg-brass/10 transition-all duration-300 rounded-none px-6 py-3

components.search_input: IDE command palette style: w-full max-w-md bg-abyss_black border border-parchment_bone/20 text-parchment_bone focus:border-signal_cyan focus:ring-1 focus:ring-signal_cyan font-mono rounded-none px-4 py-2
components.tag_chips: px-3 py-1 text-xs font-mono rounded-full border border-signal_teal/30 bg-signal_teal/10 text-signal_cyan whitespace-nowrap overflow-hidden text-ellipsis max-w-full

markdown.code_blocks: bg-abyss_black p-4 rounded-none border-l-2 border-signal_cyan font-mono text-sm overflow-x-auto my-6
markdown.inline_code: bg-midnight_navy px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-none text-signal_cyan font-mono text-sm

transitions.route_shift: Water-ripple or depth-shift morph transition between '/' and '/log'. Use Framer Motion for a page-level unmasking effect where the cinematic ocean view descends/fades into a command console grid.

textures.film_grain: CSS implementation: Create an SVG noise filter overlay, apply it to a fixed div covering viewport, set mix-blend-mode: overlay, pointer-events: none, opacity: 0.08 - 0.12.

image_urls.description: Close up of dark moody ocean waves, perfect for the hero section background with overlay.
Vintage brass compass on wooden surface, representing navigation and depth.
Moody dark sea waves for deep scroll parallax depth.
Antique brass compass with open lid on dark surface.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement this hybrid architecture with React Router. Route '/' uses pure HTML/Tailwind with Lenis scroll, Framer Motion, and luxury typography (no rigid Shadcn cards). Route '/log' uses heavily customized Shadcn components for the IDE layout (sidebar, search, cards). Ensure 'data-testid' are placed on all interactive items. Fonts and colors MUST follow these JSON tokens exactly. Extract markdown frontmatter tags correctly to match the tag chips styling.
